hypotheses.title: Tune aging window to preserve fine precipitates
hypotheses.summary: Adjust aging time and temperature to improve precipitate strengthening while avoiding overaging.
risks: Ductility impact is not fully covered by current evidence.
missing_evidence: Direct ductility measurements for the proposed aging window.

doe_plan.objective: Verify strength, hardness and ductility after adjusted aging.

hypotheses.title: Use partial Zr substitution to reduce expensive Sc dependency
hypotheses.summary: Use zirconium-supported dispersoids as a cheaper route toward stable strengthening effects.
risks: Requires validation for the target alloy family.
missing_evidence: Direct comparison of Sc-only and Zr-assisted routes in the same processing window.

doe_plan.objective: Compare baseline, low-Sc and Zr-assisted variants under the same aging schedule.

hypotheses.title: Increase Sc addition for grain-structure strengthening
hypotheses.summary: Use scandium addition to refine grain structure and improve strength.
risks: Estimated cost delta exceeds the hard constraint.
Supply and procurement risk may be high.
missing_evidence: Exact cost model for target production scale.

doe_plan.objective: Only run if cost constraint is relaxed or cheaper substitution is available.

hypotheses.title: Add ductility measurements as a required gate
hypotheses.summary: The corpus lacks enough evidence about ductility loss, so DOE should gate all strength-focused hypotheses with elongation tests.
risks: Ranking may overestimate strength options if ductility is not measured.
missing_evidence: Ductility loss data for each candidate processing route.

doe_plan.objective: Measure elongation for all candidate conditions before promotion to pilot.
